inputs.label: Training Max Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Training max as a percentage of 1RM. In the Wendler 5/3/1 program, 90% is typically used.

businessContext_i18n.en: Training max as a percentage of 1RM. In Wendler 5/3/1 program, typically 90% is used.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1RM'nin yüzdesi olarak training max değeri. Wendler 5/3/1 programında genellikle %90 kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Training Max als Prozentsatz des 1RM. Im Wendler 5/3/1-Programm wird normalerweise 90 % verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur du max d'entraînement en pourcentage de la 1RM. Dans le programme Wendler 5/3/1, généralement 90 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor del máximo de entrenamiento como porcentaje del 1RM. En el programa Wendler 5/3/1 se usa generalmente el 90%.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة الحد الأقصى للتدريب كنسبة مئوية من 1RM. في برنامج Wendler 5/3/1، يُستخدم عادةً %90.
